meta.title: Advanced Dental Technology | Prudentia Micro Dental Care
meta.description: Experience modern dentistry with minimal pain and maximum precision at Prudentia Micro Dental Care.

hero.paragraph: At Prudentia, we combine state-of-the-art dental technology with advanced skills to transform your experience into one that's comfortable, fast, and stress-free.

fear.title: Fear of the dentist? You're not alone.
fear.paragraph1: For many, just the sound of a dental drill or sight of a needle can trigger anxiety. But dentistry has changed dramatically.
fear.paragraph2: From painless dental injections to microscope-assisted precision dentistry, here's how we're redefining modern dental care.
fear.callToAction: Call us to discuss your concerns

featuresSection.title: Advanced Dental Technology
featuresSection.subtitle: Discover how our cutting-edge equipment enhances your dental experience

features.title: Dental Operating Microscope
features.description: High-Precision Dentistry You Can See. Magnifies your teeth up to 30x for early diagnosis and minimally invasive treatments.

features.title: Fluorescent Caries Detection
features.description: Spot Cavities Before They Spread. Uses fluorescent light to highlight decay in its earliest stage.

features.title: Needle-Free Electronic Anesthesia
features.description: Say Goodbye to Painful Injections. Delivers a mild electrical pulse to numb the area.
benefits: Ideal for kids and anxious patients

features.title: Advanced Root Canal Technology
features.description: Safe. Effective. Painless. Offers more accuracy, better cleaning, and faster recovery.

features.title: Digital X-Rays
features.description: Instant, Safer, Sharper Diagnostics. Reduces radiation exposure by up to 80%.

features.title: Ultrasonic Cleaning
features.description: Next-Level Dental Hygiene. Removes tough tartar without damaging your enamel.

sterilization.title: European-Standard Sterilization Protocols
sterilization.paragraph: Your Safety. Our Priority. We strictly follow IDA and European standards for sterilization.

cta.title: Experience Next-Gen Dentistry at Prudentia Micro Dental Care
cta.paragraph: From painless anesthesia to microscope enhanced precision, we're proud to offer one of the most advanced dental experiences in the region.

cards.title: Pain-Free Dentistry
cards.description: No more fear of needles or pain
